Notice Of Hearing On Petition And Motion To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award
Off Calendar May-28-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONER MAIN STREET BUSINESS LOANS, LLC Hearing On Petition And Motion To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award is Granted. No opposition filed. Order signed. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)

MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER MAIN STREET BUSINESS LOANS, LLC'S Motion To Confirm Arbitration Award. The matter is taken off calendar at the request of the moving party. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/EHG)
